history.title: Day 7 added — Water & Wastewater I
changes: Water & Wastewater I (Day 7, 21 questions) added — hardness as CaCO3, BOD5 test, mass loading, CMFR reactor, clarifier overflow rate & HRT, Stokes' Law settling, CT disinfection, lime-soda softening, alum coagulation, BOD exertion, ultimate BOD, temperature correction, activated sludge MLSS, SVI, biotower fixed-film, sludge volume, aerobic digestion SRT, per capita BOD loading, water conservation
Bank now holds 164 questions spanning Days 1–7; every numeric answer recomputed and verified in Python
Cheat sheet extended with 15 new Water & Wastewater equations; printable Day-7 study PDF generated with pdflatex (materials/)
All Day-7 formulas cross-checked against the NCEES FE Reference Handbook v10.6 text (pp. 327–353)
KA 12 (12–18 exam questions) coverage begun: subtopics A–G all represented — SI + USCS mix throughout

history.title: Day 6 added — Groundwater, Soils & Sediments
changes: Groundwater, Soils & Sediments (Day 6, 20 questions) added — Darcy's Law, hydraulic conductivity tests, transmissivity, Dupuit unconfined well, Thiem confined well, specific capacity, retardation factor, vadose zone penetration
Bank now holds 143 questions spanning Days 1–6; every numeric answer recomputed and verified in Python
Cheat sheet extended with 9 new Groundwater equations; printable Day-6 study PDF generated with pdflatex (materials/)
All Day-6 formulas cross-checked against the NCEES FE Reference Handbook v10.6 text (pp. 297–299, 330)
KA 11 (8–12 exam questions) fully covered: subtopics A basic hydrogeology, B groundwater flow, C drawdown, D remediation — SI + USCS mix throughout

history.title: Mark Got/Missed fixed + 25/50% nudges + welcome-back
changes: Fixed: marking a question ✓ Got in the Bank now actually flips it from missed to got (status tracks your latest answer, not whether you ever missed it) and drops it from the Missed list
Encouraging nudges at 25% and 50% of your daily goal, on top of the goal-hit celebration
Gentle 'welcome back' when you return to a study session you left mid-set
New Mock Master badge for scoring 70%+ on a full practice exam (ready for the Jul 3 / Jul 6 practice days)

history.title: Gamification: daily goal, streak protection, badges, focus tracking
changes: Daily goal with a progress ring; meeting it keeps your 🔥 streak — and one missed day a week is forgiven (grace day), with a 🏆 best-streak record
Achievements: 11 unlockable badges (streaks, sections cleared, perfect set, focus, comeback…) shown on the dashboard
Celebrations: confetti + encouraging toasts when you hit your goal, unlock a badge, or ace a set (respects reduced-motion)
Focus tracking: measures real engaged study time and how often you switch away — shown on the dashboard
Set your daily goal in Settings; results now always count toward streak, mastery, and the heatmap

history.title: Dashboard: study calendar + My List / Missed tiles
changes: Study calendar on the dashboard — your whole plan from first set to exam day across the months, with live days in green (click any to review), pending in amber, upcoming dim, exams in red, and today ringed
‘Your study lists’ tiles: ★ My List and ✗ Missed counts with one-click review, plus export-for-Claude
Quick links wire straight into the study player on your saved or missed sets

history.title: Bank: history dots, sorting, My List + mark got/missed
changes: Every Bank card shows a history dot (green = got it, red = missed, grey = not seen yet) — the same read as the study navigator
Sort the bank by day, topic, missed-first, or most-missed
★ My List: star any question to build a custom set; 'Add these to My List' stars the whole current filter; review it with one click
Missed list fills itself automatically; both lists show live counts and open in the study interface
Mark a question ✓ Got or ✗ Missed straight from the card — for when you worked it on paper — and it updates your history, dots, and mastery

history.title: History-aware navigator + collapsible study panels
changes: The question navigator now reflects your saved history: green = got it right, red = ever missed (drill these), grey = not seen yet — so reopening a section shows your progress, not a blank slate
Count legend at the top of the navigator (✓ got · ✗ missed · ○ new)
Show/hide the Questions panel and the Handbook from the study view; the question column reflows to fill the space and your choice is remembered

history.title: Wider layout, day-aware study, dashboard + PDFs
changes: Full-width, fluid layout that uses the whole screen
Today is day-aware — shows the correct day (falls back to the latest available) with a day picker to load any day's full set; plus a question navigator and smooth click-through
Bank: filter by day + topic + mastery; 'Review these →' opens the full study interface on any day, topic, or your misses
Dashboard: publish verification (is today's set live?), clickable schedule with per-day progress
Missed questions tracked + one-click export to paste into Claude as a tutor
New PDFs page: download every daily set, the cheat sheet, and practice exams

history.title: Day 5 added — Surface Water & Hydrology
changes: Surface Water & Hydrology (Day 5, 20 questions) added — Rational Method, SCS/NRCS curve-number runoff, IDF curves, and flood frequency/return-period analysis
Bank now holds 123 questions spanning Days 1-5; every numeric answer recomputed and verified in Python
Cheat sheet (equation index) extended with the Surface Water relations; printable Day-5 study PDF generated with pdflatex (materials/)
Every Day-5 formula cross-checked against the actual NCEES FE Handbook v10.6 text
Auto-published by the daily routine: Today, Bank, and Progress picked up Day 5 from one new day file + manifest line

history.title: Full current bank — 103 questions
changes: Day 2 Set B added (20 more Fluid Mechanics questions) — the bank now holds all 103 questions from your study series so far
End-to-end routine confirmed: dropping one day file + a manifest line flows straight to the live site

history.title: Day 1 added — Days 1-4 fully loaded
changes: Mathematics (Day 1, 18 questions) added — the bank now spans Days 1-4 (83 questions)
Demonstrates the daily routine: one new file + a manifest line, and Today, Bank, and Progress all updated with no code changes

history.title: Real questions Days 2-4 + daily-append structure
changes: 65 real questions now live: Fluid Mechanics I (20), Pipe Flow (21), Hydraulics (24)
New data model: one file per study day (data/days/dayNN.json) + manifest — adding a day auto-updates the whole app
Documented the FE engine to site daily routine (docs/engine-integration.md)

history.title: Real questions, schedule, equations panel
changes: Real exam questions loading from the FE engine, tagged by day/topic
Full equations list in the searchable Handbook panel; KaTeX math
Equations hidden by default; worked solution unlocks step by step; numeric-entry supported

history.title: Equation breakdowns, step-by-step, Handbook panel
changes: Relevant equations shown up front; unlock the worked solution one step at a time
Searchable Handbook panel; Question Bank browse/search/filter; live version badge

history.title: Progress, spaced repetition, settings
changes: Progress dashboard with per-section mastery, streak, days-to-exam
Leitner spaced repetition; Settings: daily size, mix, reveal mode, SRS toggle

history.title: Daily player
changes: Today's daily question set; hide / reveal answers with self-grade; daily streak

history.title: Site live
changes: pefeprep.com live on GitHub Pages with auto-deploy; HTTPS enabled
